pokemon:dratini.name: Dratini
pokemon:dratini.summary: Dratini continually molts and sloughs off its old skin. It does so because the life energy within its body steadily builds to reach uncontrollable levels.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Dratini continually molts and sloughs off its old skin. It does so because the life energy within its body steadily builds to reach uncontrollable levels.
It is called the “Mirage Pokémon” because so few have seen it. Its shed skin has been found.
It is called the “Mirage Pokémon” because so few have seen it. Its shed skin has been found.
Long considered a mythical POKéMON until recently when a small colony was found living underwater.
It sheds many lay­ ers of skin as it grows larger. Dur­ ing this process, it is protected by a rapid waterfall.
It is called the “Mirage Pokémon” because so few have seen it. Its shed skin has been found.
A DRATINI continually molts and sloughs off its old skin. It does so because the life energy within its body steadily builds to reach uncontrollable levels.
Even the young can exceed 6.5 feet in length. It grows larger by repeatedly shedding skin.
It is born large to start with. It repeatedly sheds its skin as it steadily grows longer.
It is born large to start with. It repeatedly sheds its skin as it steadily grows longer.
Long considered a mythical POKéMON until recently, when a small colony was found living underwater.
Long thought to be a myth, this Pokémon’s existence was only recently confirmed by a fisherman who caught one.
Long thought to be a myth, this Pokémon’s existence was only recently confirmed by a fisherman who caught one.
After a 10-hour struggle, a fisherman was able to pull one up and confirm its existence.
Dratini continually molts and sloughs off its old skin. It does so because the life energy within its body steadily builds to reach uncontrollable levels.
It is called the “Mirage Pokémon” because so few have seen it. Its shed skin has been found.
It is called the “Mirage Pokémon” because so few have seen it. Its shed skin has been found.
Long considered a mythical POKéMON until recently when a small colony was found living underwater.
DRATINI continually molts and sloughs off its old skin. It does so because the life energy within its body steadily builds to reach uncontrollable levels.
DRATINI continually molts and sloughs off its old skin. It does so because the life energy within its body steadily builds to reach uncontrollable levels.
This Pokémon was long considered to be no more than a myth. The small lump on a Dratini’s forehead is actually a horn that’s still coming in.
This POKéMON is full of life ener­ gy. It continually sheds its skin and grows steadily larger.
This Pokémon is full of life energy. It continually sheds its skin and grows steadily larger.
It grows by molting repeatedly. Boots made from the tanned cast-off skin are a super luxury item.
Dratini dwells near bodies of rapidly flowing water, such as the plunge pools of waterfalls. As it grows, Dratini will shed its skin many times.
It sheds its skin—almost on a daily basis—and grows larger. Its skin is soft just after it’s been shed.
It’s still weak, so it lurks on the floor of bodies of water, eating whatever food sinks down and living a quiet life.
It is called the “Mirage Pokémon” because so few have seen it. Its shed skin has been found.
It is called the “Mirage Pokémon” because so few have seen it. Its shed skin has been found.
It is called the “Mirage Pokémon” because so few have seen it. Its shed skin has been found.
This Pokémon is full of life energy. It continually sheds its skin and grows steadily larger.
The existence of this mythical POKéMON was only recently confirmed by a fisherman who caught one.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Dratini continually molts and sloughs off its old skin. It does so because the life energy within its body steadily builds to reach uncontrollable levels.

pokemon:dragonite.name: Dragonite
pokemon:dragonite.summary: Dragonite is capable of circling the globe in just 16 hours. It is a kindhearted Pokémon that leads lost and foundering ships in a storm to the safety of land.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Dragonite is capable of circling the globe in just 16 hours. It is a kindhearted Pokémon that leads lost and foundering ships in a storm to the safety of land.
It is said to make its home somewhere in the sea. It guides crews of shipwrecks to shore.
It is said to make its home somewhere in the sea. It guides crews of shipwrecks to shore.
An extremely rarely seen marine POKéMON. Its intelligence is said to match that of humans.
It is said that somewhere in the ocean lies an island where these gather. Only they live there.
It is said to make its home somewhere in the sea. It guides crews of shipwrecks to shore.
It can circle the globe in just 16 hours. It is a kindhearted POKéMON that leads lost and foundering ships in a storm to the safety of land.
It can fly in spite of its big and bulky physique. It circles the globe in just 16 hours.
It is said that this POKéMON con­ stantly flies over the immense seas and rescues drown­ ing people.
It is said that this Pokémon constantly flies over the immense seas and rescues drowning people.
Only a very few people ever see this POKéMON. Its intelligence is said to match that of humans.
It is said that this Pokémon lives somewhere in the sea and that it flies. However, these are only rumors.
It is said that this Pokémon lives somewhere in the sea and that it flies. However, these are only rumors.
Incur the wrath of this normally calm Pokémon at your peril, because it will smash everything to smithereens before it’s satisfied.
Dragonite is capable of circling the globe in just 16 hours. It is a kindhearted Pokémon that leads lost and foundering ships in a storm to the safety of land.
It is said to make its home somewhere in the sea. It guides crews of shipwrecks to shore.
It is said to make its home somewhere in the sea. It guides crews of shipwrecks to shore.
An extremely rarely seen marine POKéMON. Its intelligence is said to match that of humans.
DRAGONITE is capable of circling the globe in just sixteen hours. It is a kindhearted POKéMON that leads lost and foundering ships in a storm to the safety of land.
DRAGONITE is capable of circling the globe in just sixteen hours. It is a kindhearted POKéMON that leads lost and foundering ships in a storm to the safety of land.
This Pokémon is known as the Sea Incarnate. Figureheads that resemble Dragonite decorate the bows of many ships.
This marine POKé­ MON has an impres­ sive build that lets it freely fly over raging seas without trouble.
This marine Pokémon has an impressive build that lets it freely fly over raging seas without trouble.
This Pokémon saved a shipwrecked man, taking him to a remote island—a paradise occupied solely by Dragonite.
It’s a kindhearted Pokémon. If it spots a drowning person or Pokémon, Dragonite simply must help them.
You’ll often hear tales of this kindhearted Pokémon rescuing people or Pokémon that are drowning.
It flies over raging seas as if they were nothing. Observing this, a ship’s captain dubbed this Pokémon “the sea incarnate.”
It is said to make its home somewhere in the sea. It guides crews of shipwrecks to shore.
It is said to make its home somewhere in the sea. It guides crews of shipwrecks to shore.
It can fly in spite of its big and bulky physique. It circles the globe in just 16 hours.
It is said to make its home somewhere in the sea. It guides crews of shipwrecks to shore.
It is said that this POKéMON lives somewhere in the sea and that it flies. However, it is only a rumor.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Dragonite is capable of circling the globe in just 16 hours. It is a kindhearted Pokémon that leads lost and foundering ships in a storm to the safety of land.

pokemon:dragonair.name: Dragonair
pokemon:dragonair.summary: Dragonair stores an enormous amount of energy inside its body. It is said to alter weather conditions in its vicinity by discharging energy from the crystals on its neck and tail.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Dragonair stores an enormous amount of energy inside its body. It is said to alter weather conditions in its vicinity by discharging energy from the crystals on its neck and tail.
If its body takes on an aura, the weather changes instantly. It is said to live in seas and lakes.
If its body takes on an aura, the weather changes instantly. It is said to live in seas and lakes.
A mystical POKéMON that exudes a gentle aura. Has the ability to change climate conditions.
It is called the divine POKéMON. When its entire body brightens slightly, the weather changes.
If its body takes on an aura, the weather changes instantly. It is said to live in seas and lakes.
A DRAGONAIR stores an enormous amount of energy inside its body. It is said to alter the weather around it by loosing energy from the crystals on its neck and tail.
It is said to live in seas and lakes. Even though it has no wings, it has been seen flying occasionally.
They say that if it emits an aura from its whole body, the weather will begin to change instantly.
They say that if it emits an aura from its whole body, the weather will begin to change instantly.
A mystical POKéMON that exudes a gentle aura. It is said to have the ability to change the weather.
According to a witness, its body was surrounded by a strange aura that gave it a mystical look.
According to a witness, its body was surrounded by a strange aura that gave it a mystical look.
From time immemorial, it has been venerated by agricultural peoples as an entity able to control the weather.
Dragonair stores an enormous amount of energy inside its body. It is said to alter weather conditions in its vicinity by discharging energy from the crystals on its neck and tail.
If its body takes on an aura, the weather changes instantly. It is said to live in seas and lakes.
If its body takes on an aura, the weather changes instantly. It is said to live in seas and lakes.
A mystical POKéMON that exudes a gentle aura. Has the ability to change climate conditions.
DRAGONAIR stores an enormous amount of energy inside its body. It is said to alter weather conditions in its vicinity by discharging energy from the crystals on its neck and tail.
DRAGONAIR stores an enormous amount of energy inside its body. It is said to alter weather conditions in its vicinity by discharging energy from the crystals on its neck and tail.
This Pokémon gathers power in the orbs on its tail and controls the weather. When enshrouded by an aura, Dragonair has a mystical appearance.
Its crystalline orbs appear to give this POKéMON the power to freely control the weather.
Its crystalline orbs appear to give this Pokémon the power to freely control the weather.
It has long been thought that its crystalline orbs are imbued with the power to control the weather.
This Pokémon lives in pristine oceans and lakes. It can control the weather, and it uses this power to fly into the sky, riding on the wind.
Some say that if you see it at the start of the year, flying through the sky and twisting its body, you’ll be healthy all year long.
Lakes where Dragonair live are filled with offerings from people, because they believe this Pokémon is able to control the weather.
If its body takes on an aura, the weather changes instantly. It is said to live in seas and lakes.
If its body takes on an aura, the weather changes instantly. It is said to live in seas and lakes.
Its crystalline orbs appear to give this Pokémon the power to freely control the weather.
A mystical Pokémon that exudes a gentle aura. It is said to have the ability to change the weather.
According to a witness, its body was surrounded by a strange aura that gave it a mystical look.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Dragonair stores an enormous amount of energy inside its body. It is said to alter weather conditions in its vicinity by discharging energy from the crystals on its neck and tail.
